# `sync` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `SyncQueue`

```prisma
model SyncQueue {
  id             String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId         String
  deviceId       String?
  entityType     String // transaction, group, friend, goal, etc.
  entityId       String
  operation      String? // create, update, delete
  action         String?
  sourceDeviceId String?
  metadata       Json?
  data           Json? // JSON payload (was String? â€“ changed to Json for type safety)
  status         String    @default("pending") // pending, processing, synced, failed
  errorMessage   String?
  retryCount     Int       @default(0)
  maxRetries     Int       @default(3) // Auto-fail after 3 retries
  processingTime Int? // Time in milliseconds to process
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
  processedAt    DateTime?

  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([deviceId])
  @@index([entityType])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([userId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
